examples:
<sqf>
_trg = createTrigger ["EmptyDetector", getPos player, false];
_trg setTriggerArea [5, 5, 0, false];
_trg setTriggerActivation ["CIV", "PRESENT", true];
_trg setTriggerStatements ["this", "hint 'Civilian near player'", "hint 'no civilian near'"];
</sqf>
name: setTriggerArea

Item.desc: trigger area X size / 2, in meters
Item.name: a

Item.desc: trigger area Y size / 2, in meters
Item.name: b

Item.desc: trigger area Z size / 2, in meters. -1 for infinite height
Item.name: c
